system.requirement: If you wield a bladed weapon in each hand…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}, you may add +2. If you do (decide before rolling), mark progress on a strong hit and but count a weak hit as a miss.

Once per fight, when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} +edge by making a bold display of your combat prowess, you may reroll any dice.

When you are outnumbered in a fight or in a bad spot, you may opt to fight defensively with a flurry of parrying thrusts and warding blows. If you do (chose before rolling), mark one less progress on a hit when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}, but on a weak hit, you are in control.
